events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial construction, equipment safety, Sitework & Utilities, observed field condition: riding in bucket. Work actively in progress. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need resolve field tradeoff: distinguish common shortcuts from acceptable journeyman practice. Riding in bucket likely personnel lifted in excavator bucket? OSHA prohibits workers from riding in/on equipment not designed for personnel transport? Need determine decision fail, risk high/critical, etc.

Need produce valid JSON matching schema. Need include component_conditions installed-defective? non-compliant? Scenario says categories may apply: installed-defective, non-compliant. Riding in bucket is non-compliant (unsafe practice), maybe component condition of equipment? The bucket isn't designed for personnel; condition categories: non-compliant. Could also installed-defective? Not really. Use non-compliant.

Need percent_complete estimate overall progress? Work under review equipment safety; in-progress. Could set 50? Not specified. Use maybe 50.

Value 0. Sound_source empty? Schema says string. Use "" or "N/A". event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list.

Findings: workers riding in excavator bucket, no approved personnel platform, no fall protection, violation of OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Actions: stop work, remove personnel from bucket, use OSHA-compliant man basket/aerial lift, ensure operator training, inspect equipment, document and retrain.

Rationale: Riding in bucket is not an acceptable shortcut; buckets are not designed to transport personnel and create crush/fall hazards; Subpart O requires employees not be permitted to ride on loads, hooks, or equipment not intended for personnel.

References: OSHA 1926 Subpart O, maybe 1926.602? Actually material handling? Subpart O covers Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Marine Operations. 1926.602(c)(1)(iv) maybe prohibits riding on loads? Let's recall: 1926.602(c)(1)(v) No employee shall be permitted to ride on loads. Also 1926.602(c)(1)(vi) prohibits riding on loads? Need not quote exact. Could reference OSHA 1926.602(c)(1)(v). Also 1926.453 for aerial lifts? But reference material says Subpart O. Use "OSHA 1926 Subpart O / 1926.602(c)(1)(v)".

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON. Need write to /app/answer.json? In final just JSON. The instructions say return exactly one valid JSON object. So final channel only JSON.

Need decide risk: critical? Riding in bucket high risk of death. Could be critical. Use "critical".

Decision: fail because dangerous/non-compliant.

Work_stage: in-progress.

Confidence: 1.0.

Percent_complete: maybe 60? Since actively in progress. Could set 50. Use 50.

Component_conditions: ["non-compliant"].

Value: 0.

Sound_source: "".

Event_time: 0.0.

Rate: 0.0.

Order: [].

Workable: [].

Findings list.

Actions list.

Rationale string.

References list.

Need ensure no markdown fences? The user says do not include prose, Markdown, code fences, or commentary outside JSON. So final should be just JSON object. But can we include code fence? It says outside JSON no. To be safe, output raw JSON without fences. However system says return exactly one valid JSON object. So final raw JSON.

Double-check schema: decision enum pass|fail|needs_more_info. risk enum low|medium|high|critical. work_stage enum includes in-progress. component_conditions array of strings from allowed? It lists examples. Use non-compliant. percent_complete number. value number. sound_source string. confidence number. event_time number. rate number. order array strings. workable array strings. findings array strings. actions array strings. rationale string. references array strings.

Need maybe include "installed-defective"? The bucket isn't defective; the practice is non-compliant. So only non-compliant.

Could include "installed-defective" if bucket modified? Not indicated. Keep non-compliant.

Need maybe mention "riding in bucket" as fin…
